theme_notes: Taglines draw from Arsenal vs PSG in Arsenal's first-ever Champions League final (May 30, Budapest), Bulgaria's DARA winning Eurovision 2026 with 'Bangaranga' by the biggest margin in the contest's history (173 points), the Knicks punching their ticket to the NBA Finals, Pope Leo XIV's first major theological document warning about AI concentration of power, and US strikes on Iran amid ceasefire talks plus Russia's renewed threats on Kyiv.
settled: Both sides agreed to a ceasefire. You two accidentally did the same.
The Knicks made the Finals and you're at zero. Pick your miracle today.
Pope Leo's worried about AI taking over. Your balance is fine, so one less thing.
youOwe: Less than Arsenal's cheapest Champions League final ticket. Still, the audacity.
Dara won Eurovision by 173 points. You're behind by less than that. Barely.
The Pope wrote a whole theological document about AI. This tab is less important. Barely.
Enough to fund a Bangaranga fan account. Yet here you are, financially reckless.
The Knicks are in the Finals. You can't even clear this balance.
Somewhere between a UN ceasefire fee and a bar tab. Embarrassing either way.
Arsenal have never won the Champions League. You haven't paid since before that mattered.
Russia's threatening fresh strikes on Kyiv. Your partner's threatening to screenshot this.
Bulgaria won Eurovision by a 173-point margin. The gap here is also embarrassing.
The Knicks made the Finals after decades of heartbreak. This debt has a longer history.
Pope Leo XIV gave his first major papal address. You've given this amount in Venmo excuses.
Iran's getting bombed and you're still negotiating a payment plan. Diplomatic energy.
Arsenal might win their first Champions League ever. You might win a collections notice.
Dara scored 516 Eurovision points. You owe this many dollars. The universe is signaling.
Russia gave Kyiv residents zero warning. Your partner is running on a similar timeline.
The US literally bombed Iran over smaller disputes. Perspective.
The Arsenal vs PSG final has lower stakes than what's happening to this relationship.
You owe more than a flight to Budapest for the Champions League final. Go. Don't come back.
theyOwe: They owe you less than a Champions League group-stage ticket. The principle stands.
Smaller than Dara's Eurovision entry budget. Still an account receivable.
Less than what the Knicks paid in league fines this season. Collect it anyway.
They owe you NBA Finals beer money. That's basically sacred debt at this point.
Enough to buy a ceasefire-themed tote at the UN gift shop. Demand it.
Pope Leo can worry about AI. You focus on getting this back.
Arsenal are still chasing their first Champions League title. Your patience also has limits.
They owe you more than Bulgaria's Eurovision entry budget. This is now a real situation.
Russia threatened Kyiv. Their bank account is threatening you. Both are somehow their fault.
The Knicks going to the Finals is a miracle. Getting paid back would also qualify.
This is Champions League final ticket territory. You deserve the experience. Or the cash.
Dara hit 516 points. You've hit your limit. Somehow both feel like their fault.
Hiring Iran's ceasefire negotiators is cheaper than the lawyer you're about to need.
Arsenal fans waited decades without a trophy. Set a deadline. Unlike them.
Pope Leo warned about unchecked power in the hands of a few. Exhibit A.
Russia's threatening to raze Kyiv. You can threaten to raze this friendship. Both valid.
This isn't a tab anymore. This is a Champions League trophy's worth of betrayal.
Dara won Eurovision by the biggest margin in history. This debt just beat that record.
